title: Cluster User Management
description: Managing users in the cluster.

:::caution
This page contains administrative documentation intended for cluster administrators and operators. This content may not be relevant for regular users.
:::


# Managing User Roles

This document outlines the steps to manage user roles and permissions within the platform.

## Add a User to a Namespace

Now implemented directly in website. Namespace membership corresponds to an Authentik group for the namespace.

## Promote a User to Admin

Now implemented directly in website. Adminship corresponds to an Authentik group "namespace admins".

## Demote an Admin to User

Now implemented directly in website. Adminship corresponds to an Authentik group "namespace admins".
